title: Test Stone Golem: 088-E02 APPLY_PERMANENT_CREATURE_FLAG

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Summon this card to your opponent's side of the field. This card becomes a permanent creature for the game's duration. Return your opponent's primary creature back to their deck (Shuffle). This card loses 10 HP at the beginning of your turn.

plan.title: Test Stone Golem: 088-E02 APPLY_PERMANENT_CREATURE_FLAG
plan.summary: Create a deterministic dev scenario for Stone Golem and verify that 088-E02 APPLY_PERMANENT_CREATURE_FLAG resolves according to the parsed effect and WARD rules. Assertions were tightened from the printed card text for headless QA.

notes: Rules text: Stone Golem becomes a permanent creature for the game duration.
Do not summon in this fixture; place Stone Golem on field to test the while-on-field permanent-creature branch.

steps: Create a match with Stone Golem already on the field.
Resolve or inspect the while-on-field permanent creature effect marker.

expectedAssertions.label: Permanent creature action is visible on the source

manualVerification: Confirm Stone Golem cannot be replaced or cleared like a normal temporary creature.
riskNotes: Fallback plan cannot infer every WARD edge case.
The engine remains source of truth; the LLM/fallback only proposes a QA plan.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run the generated scenario and update after reviewing result.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
